violations.description: Preventing contamination during storage. — --Food item was not stored in a clean, dry location a minimum of 6 inches above the floor. -Food items found stored in open box on floor of walk in cooler

Preventing contamination from equipment, utensils, and wiping cloths. — --In-use utensil was not properly stored during pauses in food preparation or dispensing. -Serving utensils stored in pitcher of water between serving.

Refrigerated Storage. — --Refrigerator or cold storage was insufficient or ineffective at maintaining potentially hazardous food at a temperature of 41F or less. -Cold hold prep table found well out of spec. Holding multiple food items 55.5F-58.8F -Establishment threw product away

General equipment and utensils - Maintenance and operation. — --Nonfood contact equipment/utensil was not maintained in a good repair or sound condition. -Cold hold prep station seals are torn on left door.
Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Ventilation hood system was not cleaned properly and/or as frequently as required. -Hood system vents are getting dirty and in need of cleaning

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. -Walk-in cooler floors and dry storage floors need cleaning
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (1 pt deducted)
Available, adequate capacity, able to maintain proper temperature (4 pts deducted)
Cooking and reheating to the proper time and temperature (5 pts deducted)
Method, clean, temp, concentration, exposure time, equipment/utensils sanitized (4 pts deducted)
Clean, proper use, storage, sanitizing solution (2 pts deducted)
Cooking and reheating to the proper time and temperature (5 pts deducted)
Date marking accomplished, discarded (2 pts deducted)
